query: Buddy complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: Buddy Telco reviews | ProductReview.com.au
results.content:
I'm writing this review now after having been with them for 4 months. I still have no complaints or concerns. The lack of phone support isn't a big issue like it was before, as we now have 4G/5G mobile internet backup in the event of a disruption to log support cases. Their human support by chat is responsive during weekdays. But it would help other customers if Buddy Telco were more upfront that their support channel is not staffed on weekends. I haven't had to contact them to report an outage on a weekend yet.

Being powered on Aussie Broadband's network infrastructure, they are very good at keeping things in order and providing plenty of notice for planned/unplanned outages. [...] I'm going back to Superloop as soon as possible and give this Aussie battler (courtesy of Aussie Broadband) a big tick-off for a service that I have not received at 1000/100 plan.

Good luck to those who are having a good experience with Buddy. Hope it lasts forever, sincerely.
In my case, I'm avoiding it like the pandemic; yes, I managed to avoid COVID but not Buddy.

BTW, the AI bot on the online chat, is useless.

Thumbnail
Phil K

I left TPG because rates were much better with Buddy Telco, shortly after changing Buddy elevated my plan from a 100/20 Mbs to 500 /50 however I have never seen any speed over 200 Mbs and lately have been getting as slow as 8 Mbs download and often around 25 Mbs, my dial-up 10 years ago was faster! The frustration is that Buddy Technical service… Read more [...] ### Recent reviews

Lara R.

Buddy Telco I love you please never change. I switched from Buddy to save a little money as another provider had a limited time offer. I regretted it so much and switched back to buddy. Customer service is unmatched and the internet speed is relatively consistent compared to other providers. Today I had Ben from customer support and Yazid from technical support help me out and both were amazing. I love you Buddy Telco. Show details

Ash J

So switched over from Superloop a while back and have had no major issues however any issues I have had were reported via the app and dealt with via customer service. Had to get a new nbn modem put in recently but apart from that service is great and for the price can't be beat! Show details

Grande Johnson

At times, can be very frustrating, with the lack of communication- unless I initiate first. Such as random deposits/deductions from our bank account with no explanation as to what it was for. Missing tax accounts and never figured out or notified us for months- that payments were being withheld- but we had no account set up for withholding- to deposit tax payments in.Buddypunch was withholding city taxes for months- when I told them we were not responsible to pay into said city from the beginning. I felt like I had to alot of the set up work for buddypunch- when we were paying for them to handle payroll- which includes the taxes involved. Now we are stuck with reimbursing employees for taxes that we told buddypunch were not supposed to be taken from our employees. results.title: Known Issues | Session Buddy
results.content:
# Known Issues | Session Buddy

Session Buddy

FeaturesDocs

# Known Issues

If you’re encountering issues with Session Buddy, please review the following known problems and their potential solutions.

## Session Buddy won’t open

A browser bug may occasionally prevent extensions from opening when their icons are clicked.

To fix this: [...] To fix this:

1.   Open the Session Buddy extension page: Right-click its icon in the browser toolbar, then click “Manage extension”
2.   Enable developer mode: Ensure that “Developer mode” is toggled on in the upper-right corner of this page
3.   Check service worker status: Under “Inspect views”, confirm that the “service worker” link shows as “(Inactive)”, which would be expected if Session Buddy isn’t opening when its icon is clicked.
4.   Disable/enable Session Buddy: Toggle off the extension, wait a few seconds, then toggle it back on

Confirm that the “service worker” link no longer shows as “(Inactive)”. If it does, repeat step 4 until it doesn’t.

If after a few tries the “service worker” still shows as “(Inactive)”, try restarting the browser. [...] If something isn't quite right, or you just want to say hi, we'd love tohear from you.

results.title: Honest Buddy Punch Review 2026: Pros, Cons, Features & Pricing Breakdown
results.content:
## User Feedback and Testimonials

Buddy Punch generally received positive reviews on all review sites. It’s praised for its user-friendly interface, helpful scheduling/alerts, GPS tracking, and suitability for field/remote teams, but some users reported issues with the app not always registering punches, which caused discrepancies, like being clocked in for too long or missing punches.

For example, the most relevant review on Capterra, where Buddy Puncy has a 4.8-star average rating, comes from Mark B on Sept. 22, 2025, in which he says, “It allows me to have a more accurate payroll with time breaks and exact punch-in/punch-out times.” [...] ## Customer Support

Score: 5/10

Support is a very important part of any time tracking company. Having a real person to talk with when I have a question about the system is crucial. The support during the trial was excellent; they provided clear instructions on how to operate the system and tried to assign me an onboarding agent to help me complete my account setup. Unfortunately, after the trial period ended, a customer must upgrade to the highest-tier plan for “Dedicated Support,” suggesting I may not receive the same level of support without ponying up additional money.

On the web, clicking Support took me to a help center that allowed me to search for answers to a wide variety of questions.

Buddy Punch Support [...] On Apple, Buddy Punch has a 4.9-star rating out of 5 stars. A few critical reviews do exist, including one from South Florida Catering, which was published on Jan. 15, 2024: “We have a business with about 75 employees that we pull from based on the size of our events. Having to inactivate them all and then reactivate every month led to errors and holdups when employees would clock in. The software would be better if it only charged for employees who actively punch in during a month, while letting us leave all of our employees active in the system. Also, we had a pattern with some employees with darker skin having problems with facial recognition. So, that was a bit embarrassing and led to the final decision to put everyone back on punch cards.”

## Buddy Punch vs. OnTheClock
